survivingCurrentGraphReplay.method: Replay current resolved explicit relations over first-parent changed-path lists. This is a lower-bound workload estimate with survivorship bias, not historical precision or recall.

survivingCurrentImplementationGraphRepla.method: Same surviving-current-graph replay, excluding relations whose resolved target is itself a discovered document.

knownBrokenCaseReplay.method: Replay only commits touching each currently broken document or its old target path, plus HEAD. A blank-line block digest approximates block identity for these known prose/list cases.
